headline: How The FactSet (FDS) Story Is Shifting As Price Targets Reset And AI Deals Advance
summary: FactSet Research Systems is seeing only a modest reset in expectations, with the fair value estimate nudged from US$252.44 to US$252.25, a trim of around 0.1%. That small move mirrors recent Street research, where several firms have lowered price targets while still pointing to strengths in subscription revenue, managed services, and product positioning. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets, along with the latest product and partnership news, are shaping the evolving...
